title: Model Airplane DHL 757 Plane Model Plane Airplane for Collection & Gifts
features: Size -The model airplane just the right size, collect or decoration model. length(15 CM), wings(12 CM).
Die cast - Diecast metal with plastic parts. The wings, gears and moving wheels of model airplanes made of plastic but the top part of the fuselage is metal , sturdy and more collectible.
Decor Model - Die-cast planes are great for decorating your home,office,desk, It will be prettier when more models are shown together.
Gifts - Well-made model airplane not only an aircraft collection series that people yearn for, but also a great souvenir or gift choice for birthday and Christmas Day!
Note - Some parts are relatively sharp and the decals of model plane is sticker, If you have any questions about the model, please contact us, EcoGrowth will be happy to serve you!
description: DHL 757 Plane model design concept is based on the real aircraft shape, using high-quality ABS plastic injection molding, to ensure that the structure of the model is sturdy and durable, and the details of the details show the craftsmanship.This series of plastic model airplanes are suitable for family collection, school science education, enterprise gift customization and all kinds of exhibition display and other purposes. Each model carries the dream of flying between reality and imagination.
